llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Country Controller
job.description: Objectives of the Position In charge of financial planning, forecasting, reporting and business analysis and commercial controlling support for APA business in country. Act as financial advisor, challenger and business partner to the APA Local Business Manager (LBM) in all matters of financial relevance including business steering and projects/initiatives. Be the go-to person for Compliance questions. Be member of the country and business area APA management team Main Tasks Financial Reporting and Forecasting Operational Planning: Responsible for monthly actual reporting and full year forecasting of P L, specific balance sheet items and sales. Conduct forecasting processes as part of the integrated planning process (supply FC, demand FC, financial FC). Accountable for developing, tracking and reporting financial scenarios (risks opportunities). Develop business commentary for corporate management. Identify risks/downsides and opportunities/upsides to sales plan. Document and track risks and opportunities including likelihood and decision time and review on a monthly basis. Commercial and Operational Controlling: Collect and review calendarized articles including volumes and prices. Support Country Management in steering pricing and rebate schemes. Develop price/volume scenarios. Check rebate settlement calculation, monitor rebate accruals. Track profitability on product level and initiate countermeasures (e.g. price increases) Track and support steering of expenses, i.e. selling cost, R D cost, and manufacturing/tolling cost (if applicable) Request for ICTPs of new products, providing relevant information relating to market price and local COGS Monitor development of local COGS development (PUP review, MARS Q A, material master status, tolling fees). Support operational business steering with adequate reports, ad-hoc analyses and recommendations Drive operational excellence projects Be the interface to the local credit management team. Monitor aging of receivables and support collection of overdues via development of payment plans Support LBM/Marketing/Sales in the design of commercial schemes by providing accurate information and developing comparative models for profit analysis Design SOP for commercial scheme pay-out and ensure proper records are kept for audit purposes Strategic controlling: Support financial evaluation as well as development and implementation of strategic projects (e.g. business models, go-to-market approach, make-or-buy decisions,...
